name: The Back Nine Golf | Layton, UT
address: 1986 N Hill Field Rd #1A, Layton, UT 84041
about: The Back Nine Golf in Layton provides a modern indoor golf experience centered around high-definition simulator bays. The venue is designed to combine entertainment with technology, allowing players to experience virtual versions of world-famous courses or practice specific skills in a controlled environment. The facility focuses on creating a comfortable social setting where golfers can enjoy the game year-round, regardless of Utah's weather conditions. The atmosphere caters to both serious golfers looking to analyze their data and casual visitors looking for a unique outing with friends or family. Guests can expect a relaxed environment equipped with the latest indoor golf technology to make every round or practice session engaging and interactive.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round golf play regardless of weather
Entertainment-focused atmosphere with food and drinks
Suitable for groups and social events
Opportunity to play famous international courses

food_and_drink.notes: Full menu of casual dining options available
Full bar service featuring beer, wine, and cocktails

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While bringing your own clubs is recommended for the best experience, the venue typically offers rental club options for guests who do not have their own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are generally not permitted because the venue features a full restaurant and bar service for guests to enjoy.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing 18 holes on a simulator typically takes between 45 minutes to an hour per player, depending on the pace of play and the chosen course.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and provides a fun and accessible environment for golfers of all ages, including juniors.
